creator: lazeraman@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #23)
Yep, I agree these can be skipped. I looked for usages of these files outside of generating the localization files and they are unnecessary for running the application.

(In reply to Nicholas Kirby from comment #20)
The reason no build is being used is because nothing is actually being built and replacing do-build with post-install-NLS-on causes the port to not build without adding NO_BUILD. The files are being taking from the source as is. It seems whoever set up the port made the localization portion the build code even though it isn't actually building the application.
